summary: Completed end-to-end testing of Timeless Parts & Accessories Invoice System. Fixed critical bug in invoice creation endpoint. Backend APIs: 100% pass rate (24/24 tests). Frontend: All new invoice features working correctly.

fixed_in_this_iteration.issue: TypeError: Invoice() got multiple values for keyword argument - duplicate kwargs for customer_id, balance_due, amount_paid
fixed_in_this_iteration.fix_applied: Excluded duplicate fields from model_dump before passing to Invoice constructor

warnings.issue: Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent - accessibility warning only, not breaking

passed_tests: ✅ Invoice created with 'pending' status (not defaulting to paid)
✅ Invoice delete with wrong password fails
✅ Invoice delete with correct password (19752) succeeds
✅ Invoice cancel with wrong password fails
✅ Invoice cancel with correct password (19752) succeeds
✅ Invoice print view with all required fields
✅ Create Invoice page - down payment field
✅ Create Invoice page - save customer checkbox
✅ Invoices list - all actions (View, Print, Mark Paid, Add Payment, Cancel, Delete)
✅ Invoices list - password dialog for delete/cancel
✅ Customers page - View Invoices dialog with summary
✅ Sales Journal page - date selector and navigation
✅ Invoice Print view - status, balance, down payment display
critical_code_review_comments: Invoice creation endpoint had duplicate kwargs bug - FIXED
All other API endpoints working correctly
Frontend properly implements all required features
updated_files: /app/backend/server.py - Fixed create_invoice endpoint duplicate kwargs bug
context_for_next_testing_agent: All invoice system features tested and working. Key features: invoice status (pending/paid), down payments, balance calculation, customer discount %, auto-save customer, TA-XX invoice number format, password-protected delete/cancel (password: 19752), customer invoice history, sales journal with check-off. Fixed critical bug in /api/invoices POST endpoint - duplicate kwargs error.

features_tested.invoice_status: Working - default is 'pending', can be changed to 'paid'
features_tested.down_payment: Working - correctly calculates balance_due = total - down_payment
features_tested.save_customer: Working - auto-saves new customer when checkbox is checked
features_tested.customer_discount: Working - discount_percentage field in customer form and applied to invoices
features_tested.invoice_delete_cancel: Working - requires password 19752, restores stock on delete/cancel
features_tested.mark_as_paid: Working - updates status to 'paid' and balance_due to 0
features_tested.add_payment: Working - accumulates payments and auto-marks paid when balance = 0
features_tested.customer_invoice_history: Working - shows all invoices with summary totals
features_tested.sales_journal: Working - daily transactions with check-off feature
features_tested.invoice_print_view: Working - shows status, down payment, balance due correctly
